notes: AISA detection is inferred from README and rendered page content.
Global discovery currently scans the first 3 pages of ClawHub skills and plugins.
Suspicious status is inferred from rendered security scan output.

items.name: 预测市场数据
items.description: 通过 AIsa API 查询跨平台预测市场数据。支持 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 的市场行情、价格、订单簿、K线、持仓和交易记录。适用场景：查询预测市场赔率、选举博彩、事件概率、市场情绪、Polymarket 价格、Kalshi 价格、体育博彩赔率、钱包盈亏、跨平台市场对比。
